name: Matt Boswell
title: Pastor, Hymnwriter & Worship Leader
tagline: Co-writer of 'His Mercy Is More' and 'Come Behold the Wondrous Mystery' — pastor-hymnwriter shaping modern congregational worship
bio: Matt Boswell is a pastor, hymnwriter, and worship leader who serves as Pastor of Worship and Arts at The Village Church in the Dallas-Fort Worth area. He is one of the most prolific modern hymnwriters in the Reformed tradition, co-writing 'His Mercy Is More' and 'Come Behold the Wondrous Mystery' with Matt Papa. Boswell is the founder of the Doxology & Theology conference and the editor of 'Treasuring Christ When Your Hands Are Full.' He frequently collaborates with Keith & Kristyn Getty and leads worship at major Reformed conferences.
faith: Boswell is deeply committed to the local church as the primary context for worship and has written extensively on the theology of congregational singing. His hymns are marked by rich Trinitarian theology, vivid portrayals of Christ's work, and accessible melodies that serve the gathered church. 'Come Behold the Wondrous Mystery' walks through the entire arc of redemption from incarnation to resurrection, while 'His Mercy Is More' proclaims the inexhaustible grace of God.

sources.title: The Village Church
sources.note: Where Boswell serves as Pastor of Worship and Arts
